title: leontopodium × thomsonianum
intro: Leontopodium × thomsonianum, also known as Himalayan or Chinese Edelweiss, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Leontopodium × thomsonianum has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have anti-aging properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies.
